prompt: A hyper-detailed symmetrically composed anime-inspired cyberpunk illustration on a flat, saturated crimson red background. Centered in the frame, a solitary androgynous warrior sits slouched on a dark wooden chair, legs apart, hands relaxed between the knees, projecting calm menace and fallen-divinity energy. The face is intentionally obscured and unreadable, framed by an elaborate black samurai-style horned helmet with 2 curved horns and dense mechanical ornamentation. The figure has 2 large white feathered wings spread outward from the back. Behind and around the seated body, the composition splits into two contrasting organic-tech masses: on the left side, a chaotic storm of 1 dense tangle of teal and dark blue cables, wires, plugs, circuit fragments, and techno-organic tendrils; on the right side, 1 explosive bloom of pink cherry blossoms, petals, curling branches, and ribbon-like floral swirls. Place 1 upright katana behind the figure on the right side, angled slightly inward, with a black handle and visible guard. Dress the character in a mixed streetwear and armored outfit: a split-tone jacket with the left half in dark cyan-black circuitry patterns and the right half in pale pink floral patterns, black fitted pants with asymmetrical detailing, mismatched striped socks in cyan and pink, and chunky high-top sneakers with oversized soles, one predominantly cyan-black and the other predominantly pink-white, both covered in graphic paneling and straps. The hands should look partly mechanical or armored, with long sharp fingers. Flood the image with tiny decorative fragments, petals, paint-like flecks, and micro-details so the entire scene feels intricately hand-inked. Use a high-contrast palette dominated by teal blue, pink, black, and white against the red field. Render in an ultra-detailed manga-meets-graffiti style with crisp linework, dense textures, poster-like frontal framing, and a balanced fusion of angelic, demonic, floral, and cybernetic motifs.
